exercises.starterCode:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and contact information.

starterFiles.content:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and contact information.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local user.name || true)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The local author name is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local user.email || true)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The local author email is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" 'README.md
notes/old-phone-tree.txt
pages/contact.txt
pages/welcome.html' | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."

# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and contact information.

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- neighborhood-guide mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide printf %s '# Neighborhood Guide Local services and contact information. ' > neighborhood-guide/README.md mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide/pages printf %s ' Neighborhood Guide

Welcome

' > neighborhood-guide/pages/welcome.html mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide/pages printf %s 'Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM ' > neighborhood-guide/pages/contact.txt mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide/notes printf %s 'Old phone tree. ' > neighborhood-guide/notes/old-phone-tree.txt

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- neighborhood-guide mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide git -C neighborhood-guide init -q -b main git -C neighborhood-guide config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C neighborhood-guide config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide printf %s '# Neighborhood Guide Local services and contact information. ' > neighborhood-guide/README.md mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide/pages printf %s ' Neighborhood Guide

Welcome

' > neighborhood-guide/pages/welcome.html mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide/pages printf %s 'Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM ' > neighborhood-guide/pages/contact.txt mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide/notes printf %s 'Old phone tree. ' > neighborhood-guide/notes/old-phone-tree.txt git -C neighborhood-guide add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C neighborhood-guide commit -q -m 'Start neighborhood guide'

exercises.starterCode:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and contact information.

starterFiles.content:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and contact information.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.html || fail 'generated/preview.html should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/generated/preview.html" ] || fail 'generated/preview.html is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/preview.html")" = '' ] || fail 'generated/preview.html does not contain the required text.'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu repo=neighborhood-guide fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; } git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing." [ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main." [ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits." [ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing." git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.html || fail 'generated/preview.html should be ignored.' [ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail 'README.md is missing.' [ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Neighborhood Guide Local services and contact information.' ] || fail 'README.md does not contain the required text.' [ -f "$repo/pages/getting-help.html" ] || fail 'pages/getting-help.html is missing.' [ "$(cat "$repo/pages/getting-help.html")" = ' Neighborhood Guide

Welcome

' ] || fail 'pages/getting-help.html does not contain the required text.' [ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.' [ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.' [ ! -e "$repo/pages/welcome.html" ] || fail 'pages/welcome.html should not exist.' [ ! -e "$repo/notes/old-phone-tree.txt" ] || fail 'notes/old-phone-tree.txt should not exist.'

repo=neighborhood-guide

learningGoals: Create and configure a repository from an ordinary project folder
Edit, inspect, stage, and commit two focused content changes
Create and verify an ignore policy for generated previews
Unstage and restore an accidental edit before structural cleanup
Rename and remove tracked paths, then audit the four-commit handoff
